name: Mrs Fields Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind oatmeal in a blender or food processor until it becomes flour.
2. Cream together sugars and butter until smooth.
3. Add eggs, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in salt, baking powder, vanilla extract, flour, and oat flour until combined.
5. Fold in chocolate chips and refrigerate overnight.
6. The next day, roll the dough into golf-ball size balls and place onto a greased cookie sheet or brown paper.
7. Press down lightly on each ball to form cookies.
8. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 6-8 minutes until lightly golden.
9. Allow cooling before removing from paper.
My Notes: No parchment paper needed. Refrigeration overnight not necessary; just lightly grease the cookie sheets. Variations include using frozen chopped Hershey bars, white chocolate, almond extract, and cinnamon. Half of the dough can be used for Macadamia cookies and pecan cookies. Adding apples will keep the cookies soft.
